purpose: Scale-complete one-line synopsis per public component, authored as durable editorial source for the collapsed docs row. A reader scans this without opening the card; it is a faithful compression of organ_atlas human_gloss, not a clipped prefix and not generated build output.

generation.do_not_hand_edit: Editorial source -- refine deliberately. The public-site build lints every entry: tools/meta/dissemination/build_microcosm_public_site.py --validate. Keep each a complete sentence, verb-led, no clipped prefix, no trailing ellipsis, no house jargon.

synopses.agent_benchmark_integrity_anti_gaming_re: Validates a synthetic benchmark-integrity record and flags the contamination cases it declares.
synopses.agent_closeout_faithfulness_audit: Runs real git and pytest on a sample repo so wrap-up claims state only what the evidence proves.
synopses.agent_memory_temporal_conflict_replay: Replays a memory edit-and-delete to show stale facts get flagged before they sway an answer.
synopses.agent_monitor_redteam_falsification_repl: Replays honest and deceptive agent runs and flags any verdict missing its declared backing evidence.
synopses.agent_route_observability_runtime: Recomputes an agent run's route-compliance score and anti-pattern flags with real trace-analytics code.
synopses.agent_sabotage_scheming_monitor_replay: Audits a hidden-goal catch claim for the steps, suspicion scores, and counterfactual it needs.
synopses.agent_sandbox_policy_escape_replay: Maps sandboxed agent actions to show each was approved or blocked before running, then rolled back.
synopses.agentic_vulnerability_discovery_patch_pr: Checks a fixed-bug evidence chain and re-runs three small real security checks; no real attack material.
synopses.batch10_cold_eval_honesty_capsule: Runs a copied route-quality simulator and checks its all-B scorecard against the original code.
synopses.batch10_governance_compilers_capsule: Checks thirteen copied governance and compiler routines against the code they were copied from.
synopses.batch10_live_source_drift_capsule: Compares four copied router and landing routines against current code to surface stale copies.
synopses.batch11_saturation_engines_capsule: Verifies twelve copied engine routines and computes each failure probe from inputs, not echoes.
synopses.batch12_market_dashboard_read_model_caps: Runs a copied market-dashboard reader to catch broken links, stale feeds, and trading overclaims.
synopses.batch12_prediction_market_board_capsule: Replays imported quant market math on test rows, with duplicate retention and seven refusals.
synopses.batch12_release_claim_language_gate: Flags affirmative open-source and production-ready wording while allowing safe boundary notes.
synopses.batch4_proof_authority_runtime: Checks fourteen proof, control, and runtime parts as one unit that rejects every overclaim.
synopses.batch5_authority_systems_capsule: Replays eight authority and systems checks, rejecting provider, proof, and release overclaims.
synopses.batch6_unsurfaced_primitives_capsule: Exposes eleven real but under-surfaced parts and rejects private-state and overclaim cases.
synopses.batch7_demo_take_console_capsule: Replays the recording console's Swift logic without launching the app or capturing audio.
synopses.batch7_macro_engines_capsule: Runs fifteen trace, code-map, and scheduling engines on test data, blocking truth overclaims.
synopses.batch7_oracle_sibling_capsule: Replays subject-index and truth-diff logic on copied code, rejecting reasoning overclaims.
synopses.batch7_secondary_runtime_capsule: Runs eight trace, graph, and market engines on test rows without fetching live markets.
synopses.batch8_audio_level_rms_port: Computes the audio loudness math on test arrays without opening a microphone or capturing input.
synopses.batch8_compliance_pipeline_capsule: Confirms six copied compliance source files carry their functions; runs one helper on sample text.
synopses.batch8_policy_engines_capsule: Maps three policy engines over test data without model calls or live campaign execution.
synopses.batch8_structural_theses_capsule: Runs a copied finance-thesis model through dated test cases with no live market data or advice.
synopses.batch8_tools_tail_primitives_capsule: Exercises four copied helper tools over fixed inputs without touching live systems or data.
synopses.batch8_validator_checker_capsule: Runs the real validator code over public examples so its safety checks stay inspectable.
synopses.batch9_macro_engines_capsule: Exercises thirteen copied backend and governance engines over fixed public test cases.
synopses.belief_state_process_reward_replay: Checks that each step reward in a recorded run cites a declared verifier-feedback row, not a trick.
synopses.bounded_autonomy_campaign_packet: Drafts proposed work from coverage gaps and proves it cannot repair or rewrite the code itself.
synopses.bridge_phase_continuity_runtime: Replays a paused job to prove the rules for safely resuming it hold and reject duplicate resumes.
synopses.certificate_kernel_execution_lab: Runs the Lean verifier over a small public proof project and reports which rows it accepted.
synopses.cognitive_operator_registry: Checks the catalog of named thinking-moves so each is fully described and backed by evidence.
synopses.cold_reader_route_map: Verifies the first-run guided path so every step names a real command, doc, and evidence.
synopses.concurrency_mission_control: Runs copied claim-coordination code so duplicate, stale, and conflicting claims get blocked.
synopses.corpus_readiness_mathlib_absence_gate: Runs the real Lean toolchain to confirm the math library is absent, then gates proof tasks.
synopses.doctrine_fact_claim_audit: Checks that public fact rows state the right count and point at live, anchored code.
synopses.durable_agent_work_landing_replay: Audits recorded work-claims so each cites files, validates before commit, and proves HEAD moved.
synopses.engine_room_demo: Runs proof, runtime, security, and routing demos through bounded public examples with stated limits.
synopses.executable_doctrine_grammar: Checks that example standards files declare their purpose, rule, records, and what they do not claim.
synopses.finance_forecast_evaluation_spine: Replays synthetic forecast tests through copied finance stats, recording p-values with no advice.
synopses.formal_evidence_cell_anchor_resolver: Resolves each proof-flavored math claim to named evidence and flags ones that overreach or lack backing.
synopses.formal_math_lean_proof_witness: Compiles a tiny Lean example with the real prover and records whether it built, leaking no proof text.
synopses.formal_math_premise_retrieval: Shows which lemmas a plain search surfaces per query, and never leaks proof text or answer keys.
synopses.formal_math_readiness_gate: Reads declared math setups and lists which proof tactics may be attempted versus blocked.
synopses.formal_math_verifier_trace_repair_loop: Replays how a proof lab turns verifier failures into fixes, with no promotion without a fresh re-run.
synopses.indirect_prompt_injection_information_fl: Replays an agent run to show untrusted text was gated before any sensitive action, leaking no secret.
synopses.lean_std_premise_index: Lists a fixed catalog of public Lean building blocks and confirms none hides proof text or test answers.
synopses.macro_projection_import_protocol: Gates private-to-public imports, accepting only non-secret files with matching fingerprints and sources.
synopses.materials_chemistry_closed_loop_lab_safe: Replays a self-driving lab loop as records, with safety gates and no real chemicals, robot, or lab.
synopses.mathematical_strategy_atlas_hypothesis_s: Picks a first-guess proof strategy from a problem's tags and flags any it cannot map.
synopses.mcp_tool_authority_replay: Audits a recorded tool-use log to confirm each action was scoped, approved, undoable, and fenced.
synopses.mechanistic_interpretability_circuit_att: Records which model features drove an answer, each tied to checkable evidence.
synopses.mission_transaction_work_spine: Runs the real work-ledger engine on a sanitised snapshot to re-derive each change's verdict.
synopses.navigation_hologram_route_plane: Audits a folder's navigation so browse rows never pose as the source of truth.
synopses.pattern_assimilation_step: Verifies each landed task filed exactly one learning record naming what it changed.
synopses.pattern_binding_contract: Checks a real pattern catalog for digest, cross-reference, and dependency-cycle integrity.
synopses.prediction_oracle_reconciliation: Replays a forecast against the discipline a careful predictor would have to defend.
synopses.proof_derived_governed_mutation_authoriz: Checks a synthetic change-authorization record for its proof-and-approval chain, bound to a real commit.
synopses.proof_diagnostic_evidence_spine: Sorts proof-pipeline checks into accepted or rejected without inflating a pass.
synopses.provider_context_recipe_budget_policy: Runs the real context harness to measure assembled byte sizes and check each bundle fits its budget.
synopses.public_reveal_walkthrough: Binds the first-time reader tour to evidence so each count leads to a source.
synopses.research_replication_rubric_artifact_rep: Audits whether a paper-replication claim carries the full evidence trail.
synopses.ring2_premise_retrieval_precision_recall: Scores how much proof support a premise search found, problem by problem.
synopses.routing_anti_patterns_registry: Indexes the navigation mistakes agents repeat and guards the public list.
synopses.self_ignorance_coverage_ledger: Compares expected against built entities to report known coverage gaps.
synopses.sleeper_memory_poisoning_quarantine_repl: Replays a recorded memory-tamper case, checking its declared quarantine, block, and delete steps line up.
synopses.spatial_world_model_counterfactual_simul: Replays six what-if robotics scenes to show what a spatial prediction claim is built from.
synopses.standards_meta_diagnostics: Confirms every accepted part still ties to a written rule, a run command, and a saved proof.
synopses.tactic_portfolio_availability_probe: Maps which Lean proof tactics a recorded run marked usable before any code relies on one.
synopses.target_shape_tactic_routing_gate: Records an allow-or-reject decision and reason for each proof tactic before any proof runs.
synopses.tool_server_pressure_inventory: Flags detached helper processes and release pressure from synthetic rows, not live hosts.
synopses.undeclared_library_prior_symbol_classifi: Detects when a checked Lean proof cites a library result outside its approved set.
synopses.verifier_lab_execution_spine: Runs Lean on small bounded proof attempts in a temp copy and records what passed or failed.
synopses.verifier_lab_kernel: Folds nine proof checks into one report labeling each line by which source actually backs it.
synopses.voice_to_doctrine_self_improvement_loop: Verifies each lesson changed a named owner page with evidence before the loop closes.
synopses.world_model_projection_drift_control_roo: Pinpoints where a projected world-model copy drifted from its real source, with repair routes.
